_meta.description: 評価34クエリの英語キャプション風リライト。参照の query_rewriter（JP→英語記述）に相当する手動版。gemini-embedding-2 のクロスモーダル text→image 検索／字句チャネルの入力に用いる。
_meta.method: manual (Claude). 参照は LM Studio の qwen3.5-9b で生成

q01.query_en: a painting of the sea or ocean, a seascape with water and waves

q03.query_en: a painting of flowers, a floral still life

q05.query_en: a painting of boats or ships, sailing vessels on the water

q06.query_en: a landscape with a bridge over water

q07.query_en: a river landscape, scenery with a river

q08.query_en: an interior room with a window

q09.query_en: an interior scene with a mirror

q10.query_en: a portrait of a person wearing a hat

q14.query_en: a woman wearing a dress, an elegant gown

q17.query_en: a melancholic, sorrowful, somber and sad painting

q18.query_en: a dramatic, powerful and intense scene

q20.query_en: a fantastical, dreamlike and magical painting

q21.query_en: an elegant, refined and graceful artwork

q22.query_en: a solemn, dignified and ceremonial painting

q23.query_en: a playful, cheerful and joyful painting

q24.query_en: an impressionist painting in the impressionism style with soft brushstrokes

q26.query_en: a rough sketch, a loose preparatory drawing

q27.query_en: an art nouveau style artwork with flowing organic lines

q28.query_en: a scene at dusk, twilight or sunset

q29.query_en: a snowy landscape covered in snow, a winter scene

q31.query_en: stormy, turbulent and rough weather, a storm

q33.query_en: an urban cityscape with city streets and buildings
